summary: Plan-mode PR inventory classification using the provided cluster preflight artifact as live state. No GitHub mutations, merge plans, close plans, or fix artifacts are emitted. Security-shaped items are routed read-only to central security handling; already-closed PRs are kept closed; the remaining draft/open PR is kept independent for normal maintainer review.
